## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Validation

- [ ] `cd apps/api && go test ./...`
- [ ] `cd apps/connector && go test ./...`
- [ ] `cd apps/ui && npm ci && npm run build`
- [ ] Contract validation (`packages/contracts/api.yaml`) reviewed if API changed

## Screenshots (if UI change)

Attach before/after screenshots when applicable.

## Rollout Notes

Describe migration steps, operational impact, or follow-ups (if any).

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated docs for user-visible or operational changes
- [ ] I confirmed no secrets are included in this PR
- [ ] I verified this change follows the Code of Conduct and contribution guidelines
